name: Oil-Free Granola
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all dry ingredients, fruits, and nuts.
2. In another bowl, mix together the honey, hot water, and vanilla.
3. Pour the liquid mixture over the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
4. Spread the mixture in an even layer on a baking dish.
5. Bake at 250 degrees for one hour, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking or burning.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
7. Store in covered containers.
Helpful Hints: Nuts can be omitted; more wheat or rye flakes may be used instead. Other dried fruits can substitute those suggested, but ensure to stir every 20 minutes or so to avoid sticking or burning.
